creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: At the moment I am in the process of moving things between computers and do not have the time to look into this. However, this also only covers editors/scite. x11-toolkits/scintilla also needs to be updated, as the two of them are basically meant to be updated together. If you can provide a patch for x11-toolkits/scintilla, as well as logs showing that they build properly, I will give my approval, but until this, I am not approving this.
